entries.title: Day 1 · Phone use and reading habit
entries.summary: Initial diagnostic based on a real-life paragraph about phone use, TikTok/short videos, reading habit, and self-control.
observations: Vocabulary recognition is not the main bottleneck.
Main focus should be collocations, sentence patterns, and natural output.
The learner can express meaning, but needs more English-ready chunks instead of direct translation.

corrections.to: in daily life / in my daily life

corrections.note: Use a noun phrase after control.

corrections.to: I always watch / I keep watching
corrections.note: No to after always; keep doing shows repeated behavior.

corrections.to: feel sad / feel bad about it

suggested_review: spend time on / spend time doing
entries.next_task: Describe one habit you want to change using: keep doing, make time for, spend time on, and find it hard to.
